ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that the item is */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the transaction */,
  "landing_pagetype" TEXT /* Type of landing page */,
  "measure_names" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "mktchannel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used for the transaction */,
  "shop_type" TEXT /* Type of shop */,
  "site" TEXT /* Site where the transaction occurred */,
  "campaign" TEXT /* Campaign associated with the transaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the transaction */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_measure_names FOREIGN KEY ("measure_names") REFERENCES measures ("measure_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_shop_type FOREIGN KEY ("shop_type") REFERENCES shops ("shop_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_site FOREIGN KEY ("site") REFERENCES sites ("site_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_mktchannel FOREIGN KEY ("mktchannel") REFERENCES marketing_channels ("marketing_channel_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_campaign FOREIGN KEY ("campaign") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_device FOREIGN KEY ("device") REFERENCES devices ("device_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_landing_pagetype FOREIGN KEY ("landing_pagetype") REFERENCES landing_page_types ("landing_page_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_category" TEXT /* Category of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landing_page_types" (
  "landing_page_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing page type */,
  "landing_page_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the landing page type */,
  "landing_page_category" TEXT /* Category of the landing page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_page_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "measure_category" TEXT /* Category of the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_channels" (
  "marketing_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing channel */,
  "marketing_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing channel */,
  "channel_category" TEXT /* Category of the marketing channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketing_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "shop_category" TEXT /* Category of the shop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_category" TEXT /* Category of the campaign */,
  "campaign_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_category" TEXT /* Category of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_category" TEXT /* Category of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_category" TEXT /* Category of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
